Here's a codebook for the data:

\begin{tabular}{|l|l|}
\hline Variable & Description \
\hline DUR & Duration of hospitalization (days) \
\hline AGE & Age (years) \
\hline SEX & 1 = male, 2 = female \
\hline TEMP & Body temperature (degrees Fahrenheit) \
\hline WBC & White blood cells per 100 ml \
\hline AB & Antibiotic use: $1=$ yes, $2=$ no \
\hline CULT & Blood culture take: $1=$ yes, $2=$ no \
\hline SERV & Service: $1=$ medical, $2=$ surgical \
\hline
\end{tabular}
input.question: What is the value of the AGE variable for observation 24?

output.answer: The value of AGE for observation 24 is 43.
